label: Working branches
description: Allows normal feature or task branches for lesson and product development.

label: Git worktree
description: Allows git worktree for parallel work when the user explicitly chooses it.

label: Direct main work
description: Allows direct edits on main only when the user explicitly chooses it.

label: Git automation
description: Controls the maximum Git automation level the agent may perform.

label: Commit automation
description: Controls whether the agent may create commits automatically after required checks pass.

label: Push automation
description: Controls whether the agent may push after explicit approval for the push operation.

label: Pull request creation
description: Controls whether the agent may create pull requests after explicit approval for the PR operation.

label: PR CI monitoring
description: Controls whether the agent may monitor pull request CI automatically.

label: Merge execution
description: Controls whether the agent may execute merge after explicit merge approval.

label: Developer auto-merge
description: Allows developer-responsibility approval-free merge only after required gates pass.

label: Main CI monitoring
description: Controls whether the agent may monitor main-branch CI automatically.

label: Sync monitoring
description: Controls whether the agent may monitor local and remote synchronization automatically.
